target_system.capability: Create materially new destination posters from licensed references without copying source expression.
target_system.future_user: Agent producing auditable campaign poster variants.
target_system.execution_environment: Local macOS workspace with HTML/CSS, Playwright CLI, and SIPS.
target_system.distribution_context: Rendered campaign poster inspected at full and thumbnail sizes; audience delivery and campaign analytics remain external.

known_limits: The source corpus contains one poster, so source-creator doctrine is not recoverable.
The project doctrine is user-confirmed rather than induced from the source creator.
Audience recognition and campaign performance remain untested.
